title: solidago virgaurea proles serratifolia
intro: Solidago virgaurea proles serratifolia, also known as rough goldenrod, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae and a proles (subspecies) of the solidago virgaurea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of rough goldenrod include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Rough goldenrod can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
